status: P0 EVIDENCE CLOSURE WAVE 2 / CRITICAL PRODUCT IDENTITY BLOCK ACTIVE / NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
mechanism_summary: No mechanism is assigned. The catalogue spelling is preserved exactly and is not silently corrected to the published ERR agonist SLU-PP-332.
evidence_maturity: No authoritative primary identity for SLU-PP-322 has been closed. Published SLU-PP-332 mouse and analytical evidence cannot be transferred.
regulatory_headline: POSSIBLE TYPO / CHEMICAL IDENTITY UNRESOLVED / NO PHARMACOLOGY OR HUMAN-USE CLAIM
closure_state: BLOCKED — NO AUTHORITATIVE SLU-PP-322 CHEMICAL IDENTITY; SLU-PP-332 COMPARATOR EVIDENCE IS NON-TRANSFERABLE
authoritative_product_boundary: Primary literature identifies SLU-PP-332, not SLU-PP-322, as a synthetic estrogen-related-receptor pan agonist studied in cells and mice. The supplier spelling is preserved exactly. No structure, formula, CAS, spectrum or manufacturer evidence currently supports correcting SLU-PP-322 to SLU-PP-332.
critical_closure_controls: No transfer of cell or mouse SLU-PP-332 evidence
No exercise-mimetic, weight-loss or performance claim
2026 doping-control literature on SLU-PP-332 is comparator evidence only
No dosing, injection or reconstitution interpretation
